title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Footprint Holdings Services:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
